notes: SHIP v1.14.338 - FINAL-LOOK phone fix pass (owner-verified .337 on device: 'close to comp', 4 fixes). All #pg-cmd-scoped except the #rd-botnav bg (redesign-only, display:none in legacy) -> ?legacy byte-identical. FIX 1 (rack missing on phone - REGRESSION from .337): root cause = display:contents on #cc-center broke the WebGL hero mount - cmd_rackHero3D's layout guard (mount.offsetParent===null || !clientWidth) fails on iOS when an ancestor is display:contents, so it retried ~2s then fell back to a 0-size flat render = invisible. FIX = dissolve ONLY #cc-rail on phone; keep #cc-center a REAL box (block on phone, flex-column col2 on desktop) so the rack always has a valid offsetParent/size. #cc-center now carries order:4 as one flex item (children keep the comp order via DOM), qtools order:5; removed the per-item center orders. Also moved #cc-stats to the TOP of #cc-center (comp order: stat cards -> rack -> bottom cards; fixes desktop order too where it had rack-before-stats). Added OPEN BAY full-width button (spec 2.5, #cc-openbay, min-height 52) after the rack vitals -> cmd_openHeroBay(mount) (SAME door as the existing hero tap - one door, two affordances); JS-toggled with the rack via cmd_heroAux/cmd_heroHideAux, in the S0 hide-list. FIX 2 (MASTER . NaNd): cmd_masterAgeInfo did Date.now() - ts where savedAt is an ISO STRING -> NaN -> 'NaNd'. Coerce ts to epoch ms (number passthrough / Date.parse for string), clamp negative, add 'just now' (<60s) + minutes (<1h). Restyled .cc-agechip to the dark stat-card surface + --cyan-border-lo (was bright cyan border/fill, off-comp). FIX 3 (ghost squeezed in corner): phantom-ghost-v2.webp is PORTRAIT 1086x1448 but was sized width=56 height=56 (square) -> object-fit:contain letterboxed it to ~42x56 with side gaps. Per the art-sizing law portrait sizes by HEIGHT: markup now width=63 height=84 (0.75 aspect), CSS height:84px/width:auto (>=72), glow radius bumped, uncropped. FIX 4 (bottom nav too light): #rd-botnav background swapped from the translucent linear-gradient + backdrop-blur to the solid stat-card surface (linear-gradient 158deg #050506->#000) matching the RACKS tile; kept the .287 translateZ pin + border-top. Gates: inline-JS vm.Script x3 (cmd_masterAgeInfo + cmd_heroAux/HideAux touched), CSS brace net-0, sw.js ok, version.json valid, three-stamp .337->.338; phantom-ship-gate + phantom-rd-reviewer pre-commit. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-REFRESH / clear SW first, PHONE): (1) 3D rack renders between the stat cards and quick tools, NEXT-U pulses, OPEN BAY full-width below it opens the bay; (2) Master chip reads a real age (m / h / d / 'just now'), dark card look; (3) assistant ghost larger + cleanly cropped with its glow, not cornered; (4) bottom nav is solid black like the stat tiles. ?legacy=1 pixel-identical. Desktop >=1024 still the .337 3-region (now stats-before-rack). NEXT = .339 desktop top-nav. ROLLBACK: revert this commit.
